welcome.headline: Stop overpaying for AI tokens
welcome.description: KRouter's smart routing picks the cheapest capable provider for every request — automatically saving you money on each call.
welcome.feature_local: Runs entirely on your machine — no cloud uploads, no data collection
welcome.feature_keys: API keys never written to disk — forwarded directly at request time
welcome.feature_nollm: No LLM calls of its own — just routes between the providers you already use
welcome.feature_auto: This wizard handles the setup automatically. Takes about 30 seconds.

detect.title: Detected AI agents
detect.detail: KRouter will patch these agent configs to route through the proxy.
detect.none_detail: KRouter works with OpenClaw, Claude Code, Cursor, Hermes, and more. Install one of these agents first, then re-run the wizard.

agentPaths.title: Agent Paths
agentPaths.detail: Pick which AI agents KRouter should inherit vendor endpoints and API keys from. The daemon scans these configs every time it starts.
agentPaths.no_vendors: No vendors found in this config
agentPaths.select_one: Select at least one agent to continue

service.title: Install daemon
service.detail: KRouter will be copied to ~/.local/bin/krouter and registered as a user service so it starts automatically.

shell.title: Shell integration
shell.detail: Adds eval "$(krouter shell-init)" to your shell RC so ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL is set automatically.
shell.done: Shell integration applied. Restart your terminal to activate.
shell.step_rc: Appends a marker block to ~/.zshrc (or bash / fish equivalent)
shell.step_idempotent: Idempotent — safe to run multiple times

budget.title: Daily Budget
budget.detail: KRouter will block requests once your daily spending reaches this limit. Set to 0 to disable. You can change this anytime in Settings.
budget.note: Default: $50 USD. All costs are displayed in USD regardless of region.
budget.failed: Failed to save budget setting. Please try again.

done.title: All set!
done.detail: KRouter is running in the background. Your AI agents are now routing through the proxy and saving you tokens.
done.timeout: KRouter took too long to start. Open http://127.0.0.1:8403/krouter/ manually.
done.dismiss: You can close this window at any time.
